creator: bsdpr@phoe.frmug.org
text:
Created attachment 203314
Patch allowing to optionally run ntpdate at host resume time

When sleeping a host's hardware clock may wildly be drifing out of sync with UTC, ntp will correct that but it could take a few hours before the system time is again in synchronized. The proposed patch address this issue by optionally running ntpdate at resume time. While working on this I took the liberty to document the configuration variables used by the ntpdate rc script.
